title: A perspective on drought research for enhancing field crop productivity  with special reference to breeding for drought resistance
abstract:
The reoent surge in literature on drought resistance in crop
plants has accentuated the challenge and excitement of
drought research. It is essential to note, unlike the case
with most biotic stress factors, there is no nmiracle ouren
for drought, neither in plants themselves nor in field
management teohniques, nor i n o v e r a l l imdrovement of the agroclimate of the region (soil and water oonnarvation
measures, aforestation, etc.). Rowever sufficient scope
exicsts to combine all these methods to increase
significantly, and stabilize crop production in many semiarid regions...
